degree: B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering
university: Dr. Akhilesh Das Gupta Institute of Professional Studies
technicalSkills: TypeScript, React, Node.js, Next.js, Angular, Astro, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Docker, Git, Nx, Biome
aboutYou: I'm a full stack developer with experience across React, Angular, and Node.js, along with exposure to Web3 and AI-assisted engineering workflows. I've worked at a DeFi startup where I built scalable frontend systems, optimized blockchain interactions, and contributed to backend architecture handling complex transaction flows. I enjoy building performant user-facing applications and developer tools.
projects: PrepZone: EdTech platform with Angular and Node.js featuring adaptive test generation, RBAC, and SSR optimization. DeFi optimization: Implemented multicall batching reducing RPC requests by 40%.
strengths: Strong full-stack ownership, performance optimization, fast execution, practical use of AI tools for improving development workflows.
weaknesses: I sometimes go deep into optimization early. I'm improving by focusing on shipping fast iterations first and refining based on real usage.
whyHireYou: I bring strong fundamentals and hands-on experience building real systems. I can own features end-to-end, adapt quickly, and deliver scalable solutions efficiently.
hobbies: Open source contributions, reading, building side projects
coverLetterText: Dear Hiring Team, I am writing to express my strong interest in the open position at your company. With 4 years of full-stack development experience using TypeScript, React, Node.js, and modern web technologies, I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to your team. My technical expertise spans Frontend: React, Next.js, Angular, Astro, Tailwind CSS; Backend: Node.js, Express, Hono, tRPC, Analog.js, Spring Boot; Database: MongoDB, PostgreSQL; Tools: Docker, Git, Nx, Biome. I have delivered 5+ freelance projects and achieved 1000+ GitHub contributions, demonstrating my commitment to quality code and continuous learning. I am immediately available and ready to contribute from day one. Best regards, Mohd Haroon.
